rule_metadata.author: frack113
rule_metadata.title: File And SubFolder Enumeration Via Dir Command

rules.rule_text:
title: File And SubFolder Enumeration Via Dir Command
id: 7c9340a9-e2ee-4e43-94c5-c54ebbea1006
status: test
description: 'Detects usage of the "dir" command part of Windows CMD with the "/S"
  command line flag in order to enumerate files in a specified directory and all subdirectories.

  '
references:
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1217/T1217.md
author: frack113
date: 2021-12-13
modified: 2024-04-14
tags:
- attack.discovery
- attack.t1217
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_cmd:
  - Image|endswith: \cmd.exe
  - OriginalFileName: Cmd.Exe
  selection_cli:
    CommandLine|contains|windash: dir*-s
  condition: all of selection_*
falsepositives:
- Likely
level: low
regression_tests_path: regression_data/rules/windows/process_creation/proc_creation_win_cmd_dir_execution/info.yml
simulation:
- type: atomic-red-team
  name: List Internet Explorer Bookmarks using the command prompt
  technique: T1217
  atomic_guid: 727dbcdb-e495-4ab1-a6c4-80c7f77aef85
